author: Niccolò Niccoli
description: Add 0-5 star ratings, store ratings in YAML frontmatter/properties, and filter markdown files by rating. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Niccolò Niccoli
manifest.description: Add 0-5 star ratings, store ratings in YAML frontmatter/properties, and filter markdown files by rating.
manifest.name: Rating Filter

name: Rating Filter

releases.author: NiccoloNiccoli
releases.description:
- Add 0-5 star ratings to markdown notes
- Store ratings in YAML frontmatter/properties
- Show star rating widget in notes
- Filter notes by rating
releases.name: Rating Filter v1.0.1
